gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, as dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards.
Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; career counselors also remind attendees to maintain eye contact; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.

summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule was given over the PA system, observing the scene where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor where students clutch resumes inside branded folders while lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
